code.parse_mode_reason: Bass2022Partial is a 2D dynamic cartoon stimulus; 3D lifting is forbidden.

attached_instructions.text: This is an example of what the scenes look like, and how the objects act. Please press play to view. This is an example of what a full simulation looks like. On the next few pages, you will see a few more examples. Please watch them each a few times so that you know how the simulations work.
